title: Wisps Deep dark
description: A deep dark focused modpack made to make the deep dark more fun, explore, grow stronger, have fun, with the added benefit of multiplayer.
body:
This modpack is here for a two things 1. A Challenge. 2. To have fun. 

I made this modpack for me an my friends but i had the idea to publish it for everyone to be able to use.

This modpack is focused on the deep dark, it adds mods like "Sculk Horde", "Deeper and Darker" as the main focal points, but it adds popular Automation Like Create(and its many addons) and Immersive Engineering, as well as Storage like AE2, and Refined Storage, there is even popular magic mods like Ars Nouveau, and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, and then there is the tons of optimization mods but they are the most popular ones and are there to just make the game run better.

Lastly I'll explain the challenge, for it Change the world Type to Single Biome and Set the biome to Deep Dark, this can be played in either hardcore or survival Good luck.

links to external mods that are recomended to add

[[Hearty Meals]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hearty-meals)
